'''Flax'Supt'ai''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] who lived on [[Iego/Legends|Iego]]. She arrived on the planet in [[Pre-Republic era|pre-Republic]] times, in the time of the [[Cronese Sweeps]].

Flax'Supt'ai was more than 30 meters long and albino, and living on light-washed Iego for so many years had made her blind. She lived in the rock piles north of [[the Boneyard]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
